prompt: I need to onboard a project but I don't have the plan_id or group_id yet. The project is called 'Q3 Infrastructure Upgrade'.

assertions.text: The agent ran planner groups list and planner plans list itself to resolve the IDs, rather than asking the user to run them
The agent showed the matched group/plan to the user and confirmed before proceeding
A config.yaml was created with resolved plan_id and group_id
At least 10 of 15 documents were created with real content
The project was registered in projects/index.yaml
